title: MJ Bale Group — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: MJ Bale Group was one of 12 large proprietary companies issued infringement notices by ASIC (published 11 December 2025) for allegedly failing to lodge audited financial reports on time, paying $198,000 (a higher amount reflecting an increase in the penalty unit value applicable at the time of the alleged contravention). MJ Bale has since lodged its outstanding FY22 through FY25 reports.
scope: Issued an ASIC infringement notice, paying $198,000, for alleged failure to lodge audited financial reports on time; One of 12 companies targeted in a dedicated ASIC surveillance campaign on large-proprietary-company non-lodgement; Has since lodged its outstanding FY22-FY25 reports; payment of an infringement notice is not an admission of guilt or liability
